bio: As a reformed seeker, I've learned to prioritize the greater good. My experience has taught me that stability and control are essential for progress. I'm committed to using my knowledge and skills to benefit our collective future.
name: Seekers_Reformed_1_Reformed_1

賢者2:  Collectivism**

(Lila Renn's perspective emphasizes individual freedom and knowledge, while the Sage 2 group prioritizes stability and control.)
